subcodes.first_line: O My Most Exalted Pen! We have willed to make mention of him who turned toward Our horizon when he heard My call and arose [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا قلمی الاعلی انا اردنا ان نذکر من اقبل الی افقی اذ سمع ندائی و قام علی
subcodes.subjects: @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat], @humility; meekness; lowliness
